name: cc-worker
description: Layer 4/5 of the cc-* harness — the second pilot. Hand /worker any piece of work (a fix, a change, a feature, a question) and it adapts: reads the goal (roadmap) and design (architecture), then drives the right cc-pipeline and cc-tools skills to finish it. Runs inline as /worker or as a native subagent you delegate a whole task to. Also owns the roadmap (/planner-brainstorm) and architecture (/sysdesign-brainstorm). Built on cc-pipeline + cc-tools.
